name: github_file_reader
description: Read the content of a file or directory listing from a GitHub repository. Useful for reviewing code, checking configs, reading README files, or browsing project structure without cloning the repo.

path.description: File or directory path within the repo (e.g. 'src/index.ts' or 'src/'). Leave empty for root listing.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA (default: repo's default branch)
